name: @forgeax/hello-custom-shader
description: feat-20260523-shader-template-instance-split AC-14 free-end demo: a user-side custom material shader (pulse-material.wgsl) registered through ShaderRegistry.registerMaterialShader('my-game::pulse-material', ...). Shows the simple-end .pack.json + .wgsl + sidecar trio that AI users assemble at app boot.

forgeax._comment: AC-14 free-end demo (custom material shader); smoke gate verifies the .wgsl composes + the .pack.json validates + the engine starts. The full visible-pulse acceptance lands in M6 once the runtime per-material-shader pipeline cache is wired (see hello-custom-shader README + M5 milestone report).

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle (dist/assets) shape is downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime + @forgeax/engine-rhi-webgpu sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: free-end demo; bench focus stays on engine-math / pixel-parity

bench.reason: free-end demo; bench focus stays on engine-math / pixel-parity

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; AC-14 demo source-level
